title: Garlicky Fluffy Almond Flour Stir-Fry
description: A comforting Portuguese dish featuring almond flour and garlic, this low-carb-friendly meal is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: In a large bowl, mix almond flour with salt and pepper. Stir in minced garlic and chopped onion.
Add finely sliced bell pepper and gently fold into the almond mixture until evenly coated.
Beat eggs lightly; pour over the almond and vegetable mixture, ensuring everything is well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish or shallow pan. Spread evenly with a spatula.
Bake in preheated oven for 25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on top.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
